_provenance.description: Owner-authored editorial overrides for place parenting. Each entry fixes a wrong-pick (auto-resolution chose the wrong parent) or homes an activity whose infobox is empty. Applied by build_world as rung-1 overrides (before category/name-suffix/infobox signals). source_token is a verbatim quote from source_url establishing the parent relationship.
grounding_gaps: place:dragonkin-castle: re-verified 2026-06-28 against both wiki pages. The Dragonkin Castle page lists infobox location=Unknown and names only A Tail of Two Cats / Burthorpe / Pyramid Plunder — never Lithkren or Fossil Island. The Lithkren page describes a 'fortress' (Zorgoth's Dragon Slayer II base) but never names 'Dragonkin Castle'; they read as distinct structures. No verbatim cross-reference exists; override OMITTED (never-fabricate) — place remains flagged until owner provides a source.

place:daimon-s-crater: override targets place:untamed-ocean to mirror backbone place:daimons-crater (same island, slug-collision). Wiki text names Bounty Hunter/Wilderness context, not Untamed Ocean directly; this is an editorial merge decision by the owner.

place:giants-foundry: wiki page names 'Giants Plateau' as container, not 'Kharidian Desert' directly. Override is editorial (plateau is east of Al Kharid, within the desert region); token is verbatim from the Foundry page.

place:creature-creation: source_token names 'Tower of Life dungeon', not Kandarin directly. The Tower of Life is located in Kandarin (wiki infobox location = Kandarin) — override parent is a 1-hop inference: dungeon ∈ Tower of Life ∈ Kandarin.

place:theatre-of-blood.source_token: The Theatre of Blood is a raid located beneath the castle of Ver Sinhaza.

place:daimon-s-crater.source_token: Daimon's Crater is the location of the Bounty Hunter minigame and is only accessible on worlds 318 (UK), 319 (US West), or 569 (AUS).

place:bounty-hunter.source_token: Bounty Hunter, commonly abbreviated as BH, is a player killing minigame located in the Wilderness at Daimon's Crater.

place:giants-foundry.source_token: The Giants' Foundry is located in a cave beneath the Giants' Plateau.

place:pest-control.source_token: To play, players should board one of three landers corresponding to the desired difficulty on the Void Knights' Outpost.

place:temple-trekking.source_token: Temple Trekking is a members-only minigame in which the player must escort victims of vampyre rule from Burgh de Rott through Morytania to the Paterdomus, the temple on River Salve.

place:creature-creation.source_token: It can be found in the Tower of Life dungeon after completing the Tower of Life quest.

place:vale-totems.source_token: Vale Totems is a Fletching minigame found in Auburn Valley in the north western part of Varlamore.

place:ynysdail-cavern.source_token: Ynysdail Cavern is a dungeon beneath Ynysdail.

place:miscellania-and-etceteria-dungeon-.source_token: Miscellania and Etceteria Dungeon mine is a small mining site found near the entrance to Miscellania and Etceteria dungeon
